summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Federated Hermes Ultrashort Bond ETF (FUSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed diversified portfolio of short-term US debt securities. The fund focuses on investment-grade debt but can invest significantly in junk bonds as well FUSD was launched on Jun 23, 2026 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
